case_title: KIYOTA, LILLIAN et al vs. BARNES, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BARNES, ROBERT BARNES, JACKIE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BARNES, ROBERT BARNES, JACKIE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIYOTA, LILLIAN KIYOTA, STELLA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRO TEM JUDGE, PAUL SLAVIT PRESIDING. JOHN LEWIS REPORTER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISE AND FOR PAST DUE RENT OF $2,033.00 STAY RESTITUTION TO 8/15/93. STAY PAYMENT OF MONEY JUDGMENT TO 9/1/93 TO BE PAID MONTHLY IN THE SUM OF $250.00. ADDITIONAL TERMS ON THE COURT MINUTES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, ROBERT BARNES, JACKIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 756 8TH AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,033.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,033.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY EXECUTION TO 8/15/93. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY DATE PLTF. TO APPLY FOR EVICTION ORDER. PLTF MAY FILE WRIT AGAINST DEFENDANT PRIOR TO 8/15/93 BUT MAY NOT EVICT TILL 8/16/93. IF DEFTS NOT OUT BY 8/16/93 JUDGMENT INCREASED TO $4567, $1000. ATTY FEE AND $100.COST. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
